summary: Iteration 12: Tested Auth Flow (password-only login, password change, logout), Auto-Refresh toggle, FY selector, and navigation to all pages. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with correct password (1234) - returns 200 with success:true
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password - returns 401 with error detail
POST /api/auth/change-password with wrong current password - returns 401
POST /api/auth/change-password with correct current password - changes password successfully
GET /api/settings/auto-refresh - returns enabled and interval settings
GET /api/financial-years - returns list of financial years
GET /api/staff - returns staff list (empty after DB clear)
critical_code_review_comments: Auth uses SHA256 hashing (not bcrypt) - acceptable for simple password-only app
Session stored in localStorage (isLoggedIn flag) - simple but works for single-user app
No brute force protection - acceptable for internal business app
Hindi/Hinglish labels present on login page (Password / पासवर्ड)
seed_data_creation: None - database was cleared, all counts show 0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow fully tested. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_flow.py covers login, password change, auto-refresh settings, and FY APIs. All navigation pages accessible. Password change modal works. Logout clears session and redirects to login. Electron auto-updater cannot be tested in web preview - only works in desktop .exe build.

wrong_password_error.description: Shows error toast for wrong password

password_change.description: Change password via Admin dropdown modal

logout.description: Logout clears session and redirects to login

notes.electron_auto_updater: Cannot be tested in web preview - only works in desktop .exe build
notes.database_state: Database was cleared - all data counts show 0
notes.light_theme: App uses light theme (correct per user preference)
